raw_consumer_statement:
Approximately XX/XX/XXXX I discover an unauthorized charge of {XXXX} to XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX  on my XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX for XXXX days XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX. I immediately contacted XXXX who closes the account, removes the unauthorized charge and issues me a new charge card. I notice in my statement dated XX/XX/XXXX that the charge is reinstated and I receive a letter dated XX/XX/XXXX that XXXX is referring this transaction to a dispute specialist. I them received a letter date XX/XX/XXXX that concluded the transaction is not fraudulent. 
I receive a call on XX/XX/XXXX from the Dispute Department at XXXX saying I am being held responsible for this charge of {$XXXX}, primarily because I was in XXXX XXXX at that time and my email and phone number was used and credit card was used. 
My communications to XXXX included an email XX/XX/XXXX stating I contacted XXXX for a refund. On XX/XX/XXXX I send a letter to XXXX detailing my attempts to get a refund from XXXX because no-one showed up for the reservation. On XX/XX/XXXX I send another letter to XXXX with proof that I stayed at XXXX XXXX  during this trip to XXXX XXXX from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX FREE. On XX/XX/XXXX I send another letter to XXXX enclosing a copy of my Boarding pass from XXXX to XXXX XXXX arriving at XXXX am PST ( XXXX HST ). The reservation for the {$XXXX} was made on XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX HST. I am already in XXXX XXXX at XXXX HST so I could not possibly have made this reservation with XXXX. My next letter to XXXX dated XX/XX/XXXX informs XXXX that XXXX has refunded XXXX  all monies except for {$XXXX} a one night no-show fee. On XX/XX/XXXX I send a letter to dispute the decision made by XXXX that this was not fraud. 
I receive a letter today dated XX/XX/XXXX from XXXX stating that this was not fraud and I am liable for the {$XXXX} and it is now due.
